error_signature: Preserve on navigation setting not saved
title: Variable preserve setting not saved
symptom: The variable retains old data when navigating back to the list view, despite settings indicating it should not. This leads to outdated information being displayed on the detail view.
applies_when: Using a variable that should not preserve data
not_this_if: The variable is correctly set to not preserve on navigation and saved
root_cause: The user mistakenly believed that the changes to the 'Preserve on navigation' setting were automatically saved. Without a clear save action, the setting remained unchanged, causing the variable to retain old data.
fix_steps: Go to the variable collection settings
Look for a save option or confirmation that changes are saved
Test the navigation again to confirm the variable updates correctly
agent_instruction: Check the variable collection settings and ensure the 'Preserve on navigation' option is unchecked and saved.
